All Arcane Aromatics flavors and fragrances pass third-party certified ISO 17025 lab analysis for 149 analytes connected to pesticides, residual solvents, heavy metals, mycotoxins and microbiology.

settings.title: Will your botanical or hemp terpene profiles get me high?
settings.answer:
Absolutely not. The pure hemp botanicals and terpenes used in our strain profiles DO NOT contain CBD, THC or any other intoxicating or psychoactive compounds. We independently test all hemp-derived botanicals we grow and source to ensure cannabinoids are no longer present.

 

Our cannabis-centric flavors and fragrances capture the natural aromatherapeutic qualities of the plant, not the psychoactive.

settings.title: What are terpenes?
settings.answer:
Terpenes are a diverse class of organic compounds that are prevalent in the biomass and essential oils produced by plants. These hydrocarbons possess potent sensory qualities such as taste and smell in addition to the mood-boosting properties that power aromatherapeutic experiences and what is known as the 'entourage effect" in cannabis.
 
Linalool is an example of an isolated terpene. Its floral and delicate smell gives lavender its unmistakable aroma. It also acts as the key driver behind the lavender plant's soothing effect.

settings.title: What is a terpene profile?
settings.answer: Our all-natural terpene profiles are designed mixtures of isolated terpenes that echo the terpene content of living plants. Whether it is a classic variety of rose or a hybrid cannabis strain, a unique blending of terpenes is at its core.

settings.title: What makes your products aromatherapeutic?
settings.answer:
When natural terpenes are at the heart of a flavor, fragrance or plant profile, so too are the building blocks for effects-based benefits. Terpenes are a fundamental component to nearly every essential oil and as they absorb into our bodies, terpenes interact dynamically with other organic compounds, hormones, pheromones and also our endocannabinoid system.

 

The mere scent of blended terpenes can often times trigger memories such as walking in a berry field or taking a cool, refreshing nose full of high desert air.

settings.title: Why should I trust Arcane Aromatics?
settings.answer:
It's one thing to say that you're a quality supplier. We feel it's important to prove it. Because you deserve to know everything about the ingredients that go into your creations.

 

Every Arcane Aromatics formulation and botanical extract is quality manufactured, all-natural and thoroughly safety tested by an independent ISO 17025 certified laboratory that specializes in cannabis and consumer goods analysis. Now customers at all levels of production can view the detailed limits, LOQs, methods and results for our multi-industry safety testing panel that includes pesticides, residual solvents, heavy metals, mycotoxins and microbiology.

 

And, to make it extra easy, every production scale bottle comes with a QR code that provides you with the batch-specific formulation and safety testing results you need to formulate with confidence.
